tables.table_title: Performance of LLMs on financial text analysis tasks

data: Comparative study of LLMs in financial text analysis
The study presents a comparative study of LLMs in financial text analysis.
Evaluation of LLMs on financial text analysis tasks
The study evaluates the performance of four LLMs on three financial text analysis tasks.
Investigation of the impact of fine-tuning on LLMs
The study investigates the impact of fine-tuning on the performance of LLMs.
Discussion of the limitations of LLMs in financial text analysis
The study discusses the limitations of LLMs in financial text analysis and proposes future research directions.
